mapper.select: SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TITLE, WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE_NAME, STATUS, REMARKS, AUDIT_REMARK, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_ID, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_NAME, ACCEPTANCE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP ( ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO, WAREHOUSE_OUT_TITLE, WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE_NAME, STATUS, REMARKS, AUDIT_REMARK, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_ID, ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_NAME, ACCEPTANCE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseOutNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseOutTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptancePersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{acceptancePersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP
WAREHOUSE_OUT_NO = #{warehouseOutNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_OUT_TITLE = #{warehouseOutTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
WAREHOUSE_NAME = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARKS = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AUDIT_REMARK = #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AUDIT_REMARK = NULL,
ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_ID = #{acceptancePersonId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_ID = NULL,
ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_NAME = #{acceptancePersonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACCEPTANCE_PERSON_NAME = NULL,
ACCEPTANCE_TIME = #{acceptanceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ACCEPTANCE_TIME = NULL,
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
